Instance Property# defaultUnit

iOS 16.0+iPadOS 16.0+Mac CatalystmacOS 13.0+tvOS 16.0+visionOSwatchOS 9.0+

```
final var defaultUnit: IntentParameter<Value>.Energy? { get }
```

Available when `Value` conforms to `_IntentValue`, `Value` conforms to `Sendable`, and `Value.ValueType` is `Measurement<UnitEnergy>`.## [See Also](/documentation/appintents/intentparameter/defaultunit-2n8ud#see-also)
